synopsis: **The Jedi Turned Against Each Other?!** Avar Kriss and her band of brave Jedi helpless in the clutches of a traitor in their midst. Starlight Beacon under attack from an insidious foe. Danger from an age-old enemy. Who is really pulling the strings on the distant planet of Sedri? Plus: the secret history of the terrifying Drengir revealed.
title: The High Republic (2021) #04
